channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The Music Industry's Hidden Billions: How Kobalt's Kosign Aims to Unlock Royalties for Emerging Artists
item.description: Kobalt's new platform, Kosign, aims to help emerging artists collect their royalties without committing to a long-term publishing contract. The company hopes to unlock billions of dollars in hidden earnings for up-and-coming songwriters and producers.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Apple TV+: What's Coming in March 2025 - A Comprehensive Guide
item.description: Find out what Apple TV+ has in store for subscribers this March, including new episodes of popular shows and exciting premieres.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
